title: Illegal immigrant shot by ICE in California denies gang ties: Attorney
description: An illegal immigrant who was wounded in a shooting initiated by Immigration and Customs Enforcement in California on Tuesday denied he was affiliated with any gang, according to his attorney. ICE officers engaged Carlos Ivan Mendoza Hernandez as a suspect after stopping his vehicle on a road in Patterson, California. Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons […]

title: Embattled Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer hit with discrimination complaints over response to husband’s alleged sexual misconduct
description: Young female staffers filed complaints alleging Shawn DeRemer, the embattled labor secretary’s husband, sexually abused them inside the department’s Washington, DC, headquarters.

title: Lakers blow out short-handed Warriors
description: The Lakers, who beat the Warriors 119-103 in the first night of a back-to-back for both teams, had the talent advantage on Thursday even with regular season-ending injuries to two of its stars.

title: Pakistani national pleads guilty to planning mass shooting at NYC Jewish center to support ISIS
description: A Pakistani national known as “Shahzeb Jadoon” pleaded guilty to planning a mass shooting at a Jewish center in Brooklyn, New York. The terrorist act was originally planned for Oct. 7, 2024, but was foiled when he was arrested in Canada on Sept. 4, 2024, ahead of trying to enter the United States. His goal […]

title: FAA investigates close call between Frontier plane and trucks at LAX
description: The Federal Aviation Administration launched an investigation after a Frontier plane nearly collided with two trucks on an LAX taxiway.

title: Palestinian journalist describes losing prosthetic eye in Israeli prison
description: Palestinian journalist Muath Amarne said his prosthetic eye fell out after an infection while in Israeli detention.

title: Kuwait blames Iran for drone strike, Iran denies responsibility
description: Kuwait is blaming ‘Iran and its proxies’ for a drone attack on Thursday night, while Iran has denied responsibility.

title: 98 Degrees kept an ‘age of consent’ guide for each state on their tour bus, Nick Lachey admits
description: Lachey, alongside his brother Drew Lachey, Jeff Timmons and Justin Jeffre, made up the ‘90s pop group, who were between the ages of 21 and 24 when they first went on tour.
